metadata.title: my-saas continuous assessment — 2026-Q1
metadata.remarks: UUIDs generated with UUID5 using namespace 00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000.

import-ap.remarks: Assessment Plan not yet available; import-ap placeholder pending AP emission.

findings.title: AC-2: Q3 2025 UAR for GL service was not performed
findings.description: Quarterly User Access Review for the GL service in Q3 2025 was not executed. Root cause: primary reviewer declined the calendar invite and no backup reviewer was assigned. Q4 2025 and Q1 2026 reviews were performed on time.

findings.title: AC-2(3): automated inactive-account disable operated effectively
findings.description: Automated disable job ran on schedule throughout the period. Population: 1,412 accounts at period start, 17 disabled for inactivity, 0 exceptions.

findings.title: AU-6(3): audit record correlation operated effectively
findings.description: SIEM correlation rules active across 14 log sources throughout the period; 2,431 correlation-triggered alerts, all triaged within SLA.

observations.title: Missing UAR evidence for GL service in Q3 2025
observations.description: Continuous-control health check detected the missed UAR in December 2025 after a pattern of declined reviewer calendar invites. Remediation ticket opened 2025-12-14, closed 2026-01-08 with backup reviewer logic deployed.
